center.name: 停車場
center.summary: 停車場是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括美洲银鸥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in a variety of habitats including coasts, lakes, rivers, parking lots and garbage dumps

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a variety of habitats including coasts, lakes, rivers, parking lots and garbage dumps
